title: galium ephedroides var. rupicola
intro: Galium ephedroides var. rupicola, also known as the rock bedbedstraw or alpine bedstraw, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family that is native to certain regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Galium ephedroides var. rupicola include its potential to aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections and other conditions associated with fluid retention. Herbal preparations of this plant often take the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
